name: JUMPER - THE TOWER DESTROYER
description: Jumper - The Tower Destroyer is a simple game designed based on one concept, swing the cube to destroy the towers! You can only do this though if you land on the top... of the small towers... it's really hard! Your job is simple, swing the cube and try to land on each tower. One fall and you start completely over from the beginning!
instructions: touch screen or mouse or keyboard
tags: .io Games, 2 Player Games, 3D Games, Adventure, Arcade, Boy, Boys
